name: Focus Group
description: Moderated group discussions where participants share opinions on products, services, or concepts.

name: Clinical Trial
description: Research studies that test new medical treatments, drugs, or devices in human volunteers.
averageDuration: Multiple visits over weeks or months

name: Product Testing
description: Hands-on evaluation of unreleased products to assess usability, quality, and consumer appeal.

name: Medical Study
description: Observational research that collects health data through surveys, exams, or non-invasive procedures.

name: Mock Jury
description: Simulated courtroom trials where participants evaluate evidence and deliver verdicts for legal research.
deliveryMethod: In-person at law firm or facility

name: Online Survey
description: Paid questionnaires completed remotely on various topics including health, consumer habits, and lifestyle.
